item.title: Carl Sagan Predicted Exactly This in 1995. Nobody Listened. He's Been Dead 30 Years and He's Still the Smartest Person in the Fucking Room.
item.description: Carl Sagan warned us 30 years ago: kill scientific literacy, and the next fucking charlatan walks straight through the front door. Guess what? The door's off the goddamn hinges. We didn't just ignore the warning- we elected it. Twice. The systematic dismantling of the EPA, NIH, FDA, and public education isn't incompetence- it's a feature. An ignorant population is a compliant population. That's not conspiracy, that's the oldest shit in the authoritarian playbook. Sagan knew. Jefferson knew. We forgot. "Who runs the science and technology in a democracy if the people don't know anything about it?"- Sagan, 1995. The answer is now: some orange bastard who thinks windmills cause cancer & vaccines cause autism. Congratulations, dipshits. You played yourselves. Science is a method, not an opinion. Defunding it doesn't make reality go away- it just means you face it unprepared. #CarlSagan #ScienceMatters #AntiIntellectualism #TrumpWar0nScience #PostTruth #CriticalThinking #Democracy #WereUpForGrabs
item.dc:creator: JamieGeorge

item.title: Trump's cancelled culture failing
item.description: Unfortunately for the Republicans in America, the First Amendment still exists. https://reason.com/2026/05/20/a-tennessee-man-jailed-for-37-days-because-of-an-anti-trump-meme-will-get-835000-for-his-trouble Do not let these people make you afraid. That does not mean you are allowed to threaten violence or anything like that on anybody, but you are allowed to speak your disdain for policies and the people who push them.
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.description:

20
21
22
23
24
25
26 Man Tax: Quim Gutierrez
“The meaning of life is to find your gift. The purpose of life is to give it away.” - Dr. Richard Teh-Fu Tan So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: This is Frank. He was getting checked out at the vet when he decided the appointment was over. Has things to do and places to be, but doesn't mind if you come along. 13/10
